name: conquest
description: Chrome-first screenshot-based quiz answering with local AI models

scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome:prod && cd dist && zip -r ../conquest-chrome.zip .
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox:prod && cd dist && zip -r ../conquest-firefox.xpi .
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke:chrome && npm run smoke:firefox
scripts.smoke:chrome: npm run build:chrome:prod && node scripts/extension-smoke.mjs chromium
scripts.smoke:firefox: npm run package:firefox && node scripts/extension-smoke.mjs firefox
